help.intro: Add custom tags to inject into your forum's HTML. Items are cached and served efficiently — no database queries on page load.
help.preconnect: Link and script tags pointing to external origins automatically get preconnect and dns-prefetch hints generated, warming the connection before the browser needs it.
help.cache: The rendered HTML is cached at save time. Changes take effect immediately without clearing the full site cache.
help.pages: Each item can target the forum frontend, the admin panel, or both.
help.location: Items can be injected into the head or at the end of the body.

table.empty_text: No items yet. Click Create to add your first head item.
table.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

modal.description_help: A label for your own reference — not injected into the page.
modal.location_help: Head: loaded before page renders, best for styles and critical meta. Footer: loaded after page content, best for non-critical scripts.

link.as_help: Tells the browser what type of resource is being preloaded so it can set the correct request headers. Required for rel=preload.
link.crossorigin_help: Required for fonts and scripts loaded from another domain so the browser can share the connection. Enable this if the resource is on a different origin.
link.fetchpriority_help: Hint to the browser about the relative priority of this resource. high: load sooner (e.g. hero image or critical stylesheet). low: load later (e.g. below-fold resource). Leave unset to let the browser decide.

script.defer_help: Script runs after the page has parsed, without blocking rendering. Best for most scripts.
script.async_help: Script runs as soon as it downloads, out of order. Best for independent scripts like analytics.
script.module_help: Enable this if the script provider's docs say to use type="module". Modules load after the page without blocking it.
script.crossorigin_help: Required when loading scripts from another domain that need CORS access.

style.inline_help: Applied globally to every page this item targets. Keep rules specific to avoid unintended side effects.

raw.help_text: Enter raw HTML. Preconnect hints are automatically generated for any cross-origin link or script tags found here. Sort order and active toggle work as normal, but type-specific features (fetchpriority, defer, etc.) are not available — use a structured type if you need those.

modal.preview_empty: Fill in the fields above to see a preview.
